name: Mountain Truck Simulator 3D
description: Mountain Truck Simulator 3D is a realistic 3D truck driving game where you deliver cargo across dangerous mountain roads. Earn rewards from successful deliveries, expand your collection in the shop, and manage your fleet in the garage. With challenging routes, tight time limits, and satisfying truck handling, this is the perfect driving simulator for players who love skill-based transportation challenges.
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
